title: Ultra Cobblemon
description: Modpack for my dedicated modrinth server
body:
I created this modpack to enjoy my favourite mods with a community! 
The most notable are Cobblemon, Farmer's Delight, Adventuring/Structures mods, and add-on mods to improve the experience with these mods.
This modpack is intended to play on the Ultra Cobblemon Server: 
```
ultranikki.modrinth.gg
```
